properties.query: INSERT INTO courses (course_title, description, is_public) VALUES (?, ?, ?)
SELECT course_id, course_title, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, is_public, is_deleted FROM courses WHERE course_id = ?
SELECT course_id, course_title, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, is_public, is_deleted FROM courses WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY course_id DESC
UPDATE courses SET course_title = ?, description = ?, is_public = ?, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE course_id = ? AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE courses SET is_deleted = 1, deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE course_id = ? AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE courses SET is_public = ?, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE course_id = ? AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM courses WHERE course_id = ? AND is_deleted = 0
INSERT INTO sections (course_id, section_title, is_public) VALUES (?, ?, ?)
SELECT section_id, course_id, section_title, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, is_public, is_deleted FROM sections WHERE section_id = ?
SELECT section_id, course_id, section_title, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, is_public, is_deleted FROM sections WHERE course_id = ? AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY section_id ASC
UPDATE sections SET section_title = ?, is_public = ?, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE section_id = ? AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE sections SET is_deleted = 1, deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE section_id = ? AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE sections SET is_public = ?, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE section_id = ? AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM sections WHERE section_id = ? AND is_deleted = 0
INSERT INTO contents (section_id, content_title, content_url, time, is_public, is_free) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
SELECT contents_id, section_id, content_title, content_url, time, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, is_public, is_deleted, is_free FROM contents WHERE contents_id = ?

SELECT contents_id, section_id, content_title, content_url, time, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, is_public, is_deleted, is_free FROM contents WHERE section_id = ? AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY contents_id ASC
UPDATE contents SET content_title = ?, content_url = ?, time = ?, is_public = ?, is_free = ?, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE contents_id = ? AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE contents SET is_deleted = 1, deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE contents_id = ? AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE contents SET is_public = ?, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE contents_id = ? AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE contents SET is_free = ?, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE contents_id = ? AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM contents WHERE contents_id = ? AND is_deleted = 0
